title: Tenure lifecycle P2: token binding complete; component swap partial (2 component gaps logged)
summary: P2-1b closed: all 12 promoted components on the Components page have every fill, stroke, padding, corner radius, and text style bound to a Stratum variable token — no raw hex or raw px remains. P2-1a partial: Stage banner and Console chrome band instances swapped across all 13 lifecycle frames plus the Lifecycle summary (10 chips swapped); dot states and agent badge visibility corrected. Eyebrow labels and titles corrected on Stages 07b, 08b, 08c. P2-1a not fully closed — Cost panel and Gherkin caption swaps are blocked by Component gaps (fixed row count vs. variable local content): logged as P2-1c-Components. Date row disposition: deliberate P2-1c simplification — Stage banner component spec carries stage-label and stage-title only; date attribution is a future sub-component.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Cost panel: promoted component has 6 data rows (fixed); local Cost panel frames have 6–7 rows plus an optional footnote row ('Orchestration footer' / payroll-gate note text). Swap would silently drop the footnote.
p2_1c_component_gaps.resolution: Refactor Cost panel component to support an optional 7th footnote row (BOOLEAN toggle 'Show footnote' + TEXT prop 'footnote-text'). Out of scope for P2 finish pass — logged for P3.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Gherkin caption: promoted component has 5 keyword+prose rows (fixed: GIVEN/AND/WHEN/THEN/BUT); local Gherkin frames have 7–8 rows (multiple AND lines). Swap would truncate story content.
p2_1c_component_gaps.resolution: Refactor Gherkin caption component to N-row max (8 keyword slots) with per-row BOOLEAN visibility toggles. Out of scope for P2 finish pass — logged for P3.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Stage banner: no 'date' text row (component carries stage-label + stage-title only). Original local banners had a third row: 'Maria · 2026-05-12 · offer executed'.
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Deliberate P2-1c simplification. Stage banner spec: stage-label + stage-title only. Date attribution belongs in a future 'date-caption' sub-component. Not a regression.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Console chrome band corner-radius 6px: not in token scale (radSm=2, radPill=999). No 'Radius / md (6)' token exists.
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Unbound — needs Radius / md (6) token added to collection. P2-1c.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Gherkin caption itemSpacing 6px: not in token scale.
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Unbound — needs Spacing / xxs (6) token. P2-1c.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Dot tracker itemSpacing 5px: not in token scale.
Chip h-padding 6px / v-padding 3px not in token scale (xs=4, sm=8).
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Bound to nearest tokens (sm/xs); ~1px visual shift, acceptable.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Cost panel row v-padding 7px not in token scale.
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Bound to sm=8; 1px visual shift negligible.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Stage banner h-padding 40px not in token scale (sp2xl=32, sp3xl=48).
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Bound to sp2xl=32; 8px visual shift on 1440px frame, acceptable.

p2_1c_component_gaps.gap: Cost panel corner-radius 4px not in token scale.
p2_1c_component_gaps.disposition: Bound to radSm=2; 2px visual shift, acceptable.

stage_08b.title_after: Between 08 and 09 · Aisha reviews Ember's draft

meta.o1_note: P2-1b token binding prevents future palette drift across all 12 promoted components — any future palette change propagates automatically to all instances. The two P2-1c-Components gaps (Cost panel footnote row, Gherkin N-row) are design-system technical debt that must be cleared in P3 before the Tenure lifecycle surface is dev-handoff ready. Until the refactored components ship, the local frames on those two components are authoritative. No AAA contrast regressions in this dispatch. Between-stage eyebrow corrections bring the three new frames into line with the established label+title pattern.
